message: mex scaffold created and populated (Claude + Codex configs; CLAUDE.md symlinks to AGENTS.md).
Default branch renamed master -> main on GitHub (protection rules, open PRs auto-migrated). Workflow triggers, badges, docs and mex context updated to match.

Added root CONTEXT.md (frontend glossary: surfaces/tenancy/services/testing) + copied the self-contained .ralph bundle from plio-backend — prerequisites for running Ralph on frontend-scoped issues (#379 first); Ralph's context gate requires root CONTEXT.md

Sliced test-wall issue plio-backend#379 into 6 AFK sub-issues (#393-#398). Key sequencing decision: the mechanical-revival slice (#393) skips the ~17 drifted tests with pointers to their repair issues so the unit CI job is green from the first merge; repair slices (#394-#396) un-skip in parallel; coverage floor (#398) blocked on all repairs because skipped tests depress measured coverage, and on Codecov v5 (#397) to serialize ci.yml unit-job edits.

PR #667 hardened via 2-round codex review loop (5 findings, round 2 clean): codecov was ingesting coverage-floor.json as coverage data (pinned to lcov + disable_search), floor gate failed open on null floors (now fail-closed + specs), question_answered event re-pinned (method seam — plyr can't run in jsdom), Editor settings test de-tautologized. Loop pattern from plio-backend #390 confirmed transferable.
Keep sso-learner-entry in an unauthenticated Playwright project so Google storage state cannot mask the SSO bypass; seed deterministic backend fixtures through the existing compose service.

Expose playback test commands as a DOM event on VideoPlayer's stable wrapper so Playwright can drive seek/play/pause without reaching into Vue internals; real playback remains separately covered by @real-playback.
Run @quarantine specs in a non-blocking PR step with visible summaries; scheduled/manual E2E runs keep the same specs blocking so flake signal is retained.
E2E coverage is enforced from aggregated Playwright JSON results; PR-quarantined journeys are reported separately and nightly runs count them only when green.
Retired the previous browser E2E runner after the Playwright 9/9 gate landed; retained window.__store__ because Playwright auth.setup.js uses it to install the API-issued token.
Issue #380 final review passed: 15 slices verified; seed, unit, lint, local 13/13 Playwright, and hosted 9/9 manifest gates green

Codex review loop on PR #668 (test wall #380): 10 rounds, 17 findings fixed, clean bill. Security: secret-bearing .env moved post-docker-build (GHA cache exposure), player seam gated to dev/test, refresh token isolated to a step-scoped mint before PR code exists on the runner, same-repo-PR workflow-definition boundary documented (#438). Gate hardened fail-closed across 5 false-green paths, all unit-pinned. Product bug found via flake-chasing: resume position silently lost when player ready beat the session response — fixed post-clamp in Plio.vue. Recurring lesson: e2e flakes on loaded runners are evidence, not noise — two of three chased flakes exposed real races (one product-level).
